pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 44: CREATE wp_woocommerce_shipping_zones with zone_name='Domestic', export_result.sh line 13 queries the 'Domestic' zone
task.json description section explicitly specifies 'Method title: Volume Shipping' as requirement. Verified against WooCommerce flat rate method naming conventions.

task.json description section explicitly specifies 'Cost: 10.00 + (2.50 * [qty])'. Verified as valid WooCommerce flat rate formula syntax per official WooCommerce documentation. [qty] is the standard placeholder for quantity in WooCommerce shipping formulas.

verifier.py normalize_formula function (lines 26-38) removes spaces and lowercases input. Applied to expected_cost_formula 'ten.00 + (2.50 * [qty])' produces '10.00+(2.50*[qty])'. Verified by code execution.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a WooCommerce flat rate shipping method named 'Volume Shipping' in the 'Domestic' shipping zone with a quantity-based formula cost of '10.00 + (2.50 * [qty])'. This formula charges a $10 base fee plus $2.50 per item, using the standard WooCommerce [qty] placeholder. The zone and formula are verified against WooCommerce documentation standards and the task's setup and verification scripts.
